title: Problem brief: starter discovery trace demo
problem_summary: Teams adopting ProductOS need a concrete example of what good lifecycle traceability looks like before they can apply the standard to their own product work.
strategic_fit_summary: This problem supports a niche posture because ProductOS can win by demonstrating a sharper operating model than generic workspace starters.
why_this_problem_now: As AI makes artifact generation easier, teams need clearer examples of trustworthy lifecycle structure rather than more blank templates.
why_this_problem_for_this_segment: Scaling product organizations and product ops teams feel the cost of unclear handoffs and benefit from a concrete operating example immediately.

evidence_refs.justification: The notebook explains why the starter needs a concrete lifecycle trace example.
